requirement_summary: Landlords in Lynn generally need a valid occupancy permit before collecting rent for a dwelling unit.
defense_text: My landlord may not have been allowed to collect rent because the apartment may not have had the occupancy permit required by Lynn's local ordinance.
counterclaim_text: If my landlord collected rent without the occupancy permit required by Lynn's local ordinance
column6: I may be entitled to relief for unlawful rent collection.

requirement_summary: Landlords in Lowell generally need a valid apartment certification before collecting rent for a dwelling unit.
defense_text: My landlord may not have been allowed to collect rent because the apartment may not have had the apartment certification required by Lowell's local ordinance.
counterclaim_text: If my landlord collected rent without the apartment certification required by Lowell's local ordinance
column6: I may be entitled to relief for unlawful rent collection.
